items.name: select
items.description: Select composition with search (Popover + SelectButton + SelectMenu). Accepts options, placeholder, value, onChange and style props.

items.name: phone-input
items.description: Phone input with country code selector. Accepts placeholder, value, onChange, style and ariaLabel props.

items.name: table
items.description: Table composition (Table + TableHead + TableRow + TableHeadCell + TableCell + TableBody). Accepts columns and data props.
